creator: pi@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Max Brazhnikov from comment #1)

Those are the depends:

graphics/vips
math/dynare
math/scilab
science/kst2

I did not do any build- or run-tests. For a minor upgrade, I assume no breakage.

There is another update pending, for math/gsl, which currently breaks kst2, see
PR#210168.
